summary: Plan-mode classification only. #90599 remains the live canonical issue for the iOS beta-full install-path documentation gap. #90625 is a related candidate docs PR for the same gap, but it is not merge-ready because a required proof check is failing and ClawSweeper reported an actionable docs-flow correction.

actions.reason: The representative is still open and remains the clearest canonical tracking item for the unresolved documentation gap.
The PR is in the same root-cause family and may be a candidate fix after author or maintainer repair, but current checks and review evidence block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout in this plan.
